en.description: Since 2021, I have been focused on web development with strengths in frontend engineering and Node.js full-stack delivery. I have participated in and led 10+ project deliveries across frontend, backend, WeChat ecosystem products, mini-programs, and internal enterprise platforms.

zh.description: 2021 年开始从事 Web 相关开发，具备扎实的前端基础与 Node.js 全栈开发能力，参与并主导过 10+ 项目交付，覆盖前后端、微信小程序、公众号与企业内部平台等场景。

en.description: I currently work as a product manager with hands-on experience in user research, requirement analysis, solution design, prototyping, and cross-functional delivery. My technical background helps me turn business goals into practical product plans and executable systems.

zh.description: 当前从事产品经理岗位，具备需求调研、需求分析、方案设计、原型输出与跨团队推进能力，能够从业务视角推动产品迭代，也能够从技术视角独立完成系统架构与开发落地。
